==Goguryeo==

===Etymology===
Possibly related to {{cog|okm|골〯|tr=kwǒl}} and {{cog|okm|ᄀᆞ옳|tr=kòwòlh}}.<ref name="L99">{{cite-thesis|type=MA|last=Lim|first=Byung-joon|date=1999|title=(A) Study on the borrowed writings of the dialect of Koguryo Dynasty in Ancient Korean|publisher=Konkuk University}}</ref> A possible [[w:Wanderwort|Wanderwort]]; see {{cog|urj-pro|*kota}} for more.<ref name="FKTT">{{cite-journal|first=Alexander|last=Vovin|authorlink=Alexander Vovin|title=From Koguryo to T'amna|year=2013|journal=Korean Linguistics|volume=15|issue=2|publisher=John Benjamins Publishing Company|doi=10.1075/kl.15.2.03vov|pages=222-240|url=https://www.academia.edu/6360018/From_Koguryo_to_Tamna|format=PDF}}</ref>

===Noun===
{{head|zkg|noun|tr1=*kuru|tr2=*kolo|3={{w|Records of the Three Kingdoms}}|4=溝漊}}.<ref name="L99"/><ref name="FKTT"/>

# [[castle]], [[fortress]]
